label: Cause mental state comp
description: Periodically inflicts a mental state on the pawn.

Class.label: Properties class
Class.description: C# HediffCompProperties type for this list item.

mtbDays.label: MTB days
mtbDays.description: Mean time between mental state inflictions in days.

recoveryMtbDays.label: Recovery MTB days
recoveryMtbDays.description: Mean time to recover from the mental state. -1 to disable.

minSeverity.label: Min severity
minSeverity.description: Minimum severity before this comp activates.
